[Western Baltic] GERMAN NAV WARN 161/26
180730 UTC MAR
GERMAN NAV WARN 161/26
WESTERN BALTIC. BIGHT OF MECKLENBURG.
SURVEY OPERATIONS IN PROGRESS BY MV DEEP SEAPAL/PCAA
IN AREA AROUND PSN 54-12.1N 011-52.6E.
VESSEL TOWING MEASURING INSTRUMENTS ASTERN.
RESTRICTED MANOEVRABILITY DURING OPERATIONS.
BERTH OF 1 NAUTICAL MILE REQUESTED.
